literal-translation: And saw the woman that good the tree for food and that desire it to the eyes and desirable the tree to make-wise and took from fruit of it and ate and gave also to man of her with her and he ate.
And were opened eyes of both of them and they knew that naked they and sewed leaf of fig and made to themselves girdles.
And they heard voice of Yahweh God walking in the garden to wind of the day and hid the man and woman of him from faces of Yahweh God in middle of tree of the garden.
And called Yahweh God to the man and said to him where you.
And he said voice of you I heard in the garden and I feared because naked I and I hid.
And he said who told to you that naked you from the tree which I commanded you to not of eating from it you have eaten.
And said the man the woman which you gave with me she gave to me from the tree and I ate.
And said Yahweh God to the woman what this you have done and said the woman the serpent deceived-me and I ate.

And said Yahweh God to the serpent because you have done this cursed you from all the cattle and from every beast of the field upon belly of you you shall go and dust you shall eat all days of lives of you.
And enmity I will set between you and between the woman and between seed of you and between seed of her he shall crush you head and you shall crush him heel.
To the woman he said multiplying I will multiply pain of you and conception of you in pain you shall bear sons and to man of you desire of you and he shall rule in you.

And to Adam he said because you have heard to voice of woman of you and ate from the tree which I commanded you saying not you shall eat from it cursed the ground for sake of you in pain you shall eat of it all days of lives of you.
And thorn and thistle it shall cause-to-sprout to you and you shall eat the herb of the field.
In sweat of faces of you you shall eat bread until return of you to the ground because from it you were taken because dust you and to dust you shall return.
And called the man name of woman of him Eve because she was mother of all living.
And made Yahweh God to Adam and to woman of him coats of skin and clothed them.
And said Yahweh God behold the man has become as one from us to know good and evil and now lest he put-forth hand of him and take also from tree of the lives and eat and live to age.
And sent-him-forth Yahweh God from garden of Eden to till the ground which he was taken from there.
And he drove-out the man and set from east to garden of Eden the cherubim and the flame of the sword the turning to keep the way of tree of the lives.
And the man knew Eve woman of him and she conceived and bore Cain and she said I have gotten man with Yahweh.
